The beer glass with its head of foam remains centered, Heineken can label partially visible at right.
Bubbles continue rising in the amber beer; green can beside it, dark background.
Same framing of the beer glass and green Heineken can, condensation on the can surface.
Close-up of the foamy beer with 'HEINEKEN' lettering becoming visible on the green can to the right.
Final frame of the pale amber beer glass with white foam head next to the green Heineken can; unrelated beverage b-roll.
